sn_aia_tool.description: Searches Medtric warranty policies using AI Search RAG retrieval with semantic search against the Medtric Warranty Policies knowledge base. Returns relevant KB articles with number, title, and content. Use 1-2 keywords from the claim reason.
sn_aia_tool.input_schema: [{"name":"search_query","description":"Search query for warranty policy lookup. Use keywords from the claim reason (e.g., 'physical damage dropped', 'battery failure', 'screen defect', 'warranty expired')","mandatory":true}]
sn_aia_tool.name: Search Warranty Policy Knowledge Base
